The '''Fest Resistance Group''' was a rebel organization which fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]].

==History==
The organization's founder was [[Travia Chan/Legends|Travia Chan]].

The organization gained fame during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] as it became one of the first resistance groups to successfully fight local Imperial forces. The Fest rebels joined the [[Mantooine Liberators]] in forming the [[Atrivis Resistance Group/Legends|Atrivis Resistance Group]], a military force that joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and changed its name to the [[Atrivis Sector Force]].
